subcodes.first_line: O thou scion of a cherished friend! Thy letter was received in Alexandria. It was long since there had been any news, and so it brought gladness and joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیل الرجل الحبیب نامه شما در اسکندریه رسید مدتی بود خبری نبود لهذا ورود این نمیقه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
